languages.text: "Я видел подобные сообщения. Обычно после них следовали испуганные донесения о нападении эльдаров. Осторожнее, Лорд-капитан".

traits.locale_text: "Я видел подобные сообщения. Обычно после них следовали испуганные донесения о нападении эльдаров. Осторожнее, Лорд-капитан".
traits.speaker: HeinrixCompanion

languages.text: "I have seen such missives before. Typically, they were followed by frightened reports of Aeldari attacks. Be cautious, Lord Captain."
languages.original_text: "Я видел подобные сообщения. Обычно после них следовали испуганные донесения о нападении эльдаров. Осторожнее, Лорд-капитан".

traits.locale_text: "I have seen such missives before. Typically, they were followed by frightened reports of Aeldari attacks. Be cautious, Lord Captain."
"I have seen such missives before. Typically, they were followed by frightened reports of Aeldari attacks. Be cautious, Lord Captain."
"I have seen reports of something similar. They were usually followed by panicked transmissions about an Aeldari attack. Tread carefully, Lord Captain."
"I have seen such missives before. Typically, they were followed by frightened reports of Aeldari attacks. Be cautious, Lord Captain."
"I have seen such missives before. Typically, they were followed by frightened reports of Aeldari attacks. Be cautious, Lord Captain."
"I have seen such missives before. Typically, they were followed by frightened reports of Aeldari attacks. Be cautious, Lord Captain."

languages.text: “这类讯息，我从前见过不少。通常，紧随其后的便是关于艾达灵族发动袭击的惊慌报告。务必小心，舰长大人。”
languages.original_text: "I have seen such missives before. Typically, they were followed by frightened reports of Aeldari attacks. Be cautious, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: “这类讯息，我从前见过不少。通常，紧随其后的便是关于艾达灵族发动袭击的惊慌报告。务必小心，舰长大人。”

languages.text: «He visto otras misivas como esta. Por lo general, les siguen informes aterrados de ataques Aeldari. Tenga cuidado, Lord Capitán».
languages.original_text: "I have seen such missives before. Typically, they were followed by frightened reports of Aeldari attacks. Be cautious, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: «He visto otras misivas como esta. Por lo general, les siguen informes aterrados de ataques Aeldari. Tenga cuidado, Lord Capitán».

languages.text: « J'ai déjà vu de telles missives par le passé. D'ordinaire, elles étaient suivies par des rapports affolés signalant des attaques aeldaries. Soyez {mf|prudent, seigneur-capitaine|prudente, seigneure-capitaine}. »
languages.original_text: "I have seen such missives before. Typically, they were followed by frightened reports of Aeldari attacks. Be cautious, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: « J'ai déjà vu de telles missives par le passé. D'ordinaire, elles étaient suivies par des rapports affolés signalant des attaques aeldaries. Soyez {mf|prudent, seigneur-capitaine|prudente, seigneure-capitaine}. »

languages.text: "Böyle mesajları daha önce de görmüştüm. Genellikle ardından korkutucu Aeldari saldırıları raporları gelirdi. Dikkatli olmalıyıoz Lord Kaptan."
languages.original_text: "I have seen such missives before. Typically, they were followed by frightened reports of Aeldari attacks. Be cautious, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: "Böyle mesajları daha önce de görmüştüm. Genellikle ardından korkutucu Aeldari saldırıları raporları gelirdi. Dikkatli olmalıyıoz Lord Kaptan."

languages.text: "Ich habe solche Sendschreiben schon gesehen. Für gewöhnlich gingen sie panischen Berichten über Aeldari-Angriffe voraus. Seid vorsichtig, Lord Captain."
languages.original_text: "I have seen such missives before. Typically, they were followed by frightened reports of Aeldari attacks. Be cautious, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe solche Sendschreiben schon gesehen. Für gewöhnlich gingen sie panischen Berichten über Aeldari-Angriffe voraus. Seid vorsichtig, Lord Captain."

languages.text: 「私は以前、そのような手紙を目にしたことがあります。たいてい、そのあとに、アエルダリの攻撃の恐怖に満ちた報告が続きます。注意してください、キャプテン卿。」
languages.original_text: "I have seen such missives before. Typically, they were followed by frightened reports of Aeldari attacks. Be cautious, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: 「私は以前、そのような手紙を目にしたことがあります。たいてい、そのあとに、アエルダリの攻撃の恐怖に満ちた報告が続きます。注意してください、キャプテン卿。」
